latest_news.headline: QatarEnergy confirms MULTIPLE LNG facilities struck — fires and extensive damage
latest_news.text: Beyond initial Ras Laffan Pearl GTL strike, several additional LNG facilities targeted in early Thursday attacks. 'Sizeable fires and extensive further damage at multiple LNG facilities.' No casualties reported.

latest_news.headline: 7th Iranian missile barrage on Israel since midnight — sustained bombardment
latest_news.text: Iran launches 7th missile barrage on Israel since midnight. Multiple strikes cause damage in central Israel (Moshav Adanim, Hod Hasharon). Hezbollah bombards northern Israel simultaneously.

latest_news.headline: Vessel hit by unknown projectile just off Qatar's coast near Ras Laffan
latest_news.text: UK Maritime Trade Operations reports vessel struck by unknown projectile off Ras Laffan petroleum area. All crew reported safe.

latest_news.headline: Trump claims 'NO MORE ATTACKS' on South Pars — but threatens to destroy it himself if Iran hits Qatar again
latest_news.text: Trump says Israel will stop attacking South Pars, but warns US will 'massively blow up the entirety' of the field if Iran continues striking Qatar's LNG infrastructure.

latest_news.headline: Iran death toll passes 1,444 — 17 killed in Israel, 13 US soldiers, 21 in Gulf states
latest_news.text: Cumulative death toll: 1,444 in Iran, 17 in Israel, 13 US soldiers, 21 in Gulf states from ongoing US-Israeli strikes and Iranian retaliation.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 09:04 UTC) — (1) Israel expands strikes to northern Iran for first time; (2) Ras Laffan LNG facility (world's largest) extensively damaged by Iranian missiles; (3) Vessel struck near Ras Laffan — commercial shipping now at risk; (4) Brent at $116, approaching $120 threshold; (5) Qatar expels Iranian military attachés; (6) Saudi Arabia says 'trust completely shattered,' reserves military action; (7) Trump threatens to blow up Iran's gas fields; (8) No ceasefire signals in any active theater.
